title: Pilot Rehearsal Control Room v4.7
recommendedDecision: Use v4.7 as the current operating pack for private fake/sample rehearsals. Run the schedule, sign-off board, issue triage, sample-safe roster, acceptance scorecard, and handoff actions before any real participant intake or live Decidim access. Keep live launch blocked unless all critical owners pass privately.
operatingRule: Use v4.7 as the rehearsal control room layered on top of v4.6. It gives the pilot owner a day-by-day schedule, sign-off board, issue triage loop, sample-safe roster, acceptance scorecard, and handoff actions before any real intake or live Decidim access.
decisionRule: Decision rights stay explicit: Dean Foley / Barayamal can advise and improve the build path, Barayamal and First Nations Toastmasters owners can accept their controlled sample workflows, and only the relevant authority, privacy, IDS/data, support, official-route, access, rollback, and communications owners can close live-intake gates.
rehearsalRule: Run rehearsals with fake/sample records only. Every session must begin with a boundary readout, confirm no real personal/member/business-sensitive records are used, capture issues privately, and end with pass, hold, repeat, or stop.
issueRule: All issues must be routed to an owner, severity, decision right, and next action. Critical issues stop the affected lane. High issues block real intake until closed or explicitly accepted by the right owner.
launchRule: v4.7 still does not approve live launch. It only prepares the private rehearsal evidence needed to choose hold, repeat rehearsal, provider-assisted build, limited private pilot, no-go, or archive.

rehearsalSchedule.purpose: Confirm v4.7 is fake/sample-only and assign owners.
Brief Dean on advisory-only scope and comment routing.
Create the private sign-off board and decision-right map.
rehearsalSchedule.entryCheck: Authority chair and owner roster confirmed.

rehearsalSchedule.purpose: Confirm only fake accounts and role labels are used.
Run founder, business owner, mentor, program, event, and feedback sample flows.
Run Barayamal fake admin role assignment and revoke proof.

rehearsalSchedule.session: First Nations Toastmasters guest workflow rehearsal
rehearsalSchedule.purpose: Run guest interest, agenda, role sign-up, feedback, and boundary-notice flows.
Confirm official member, education, payment, and election routes stay closed.
Run notice, withdrawal, incident, export, deletion, and custody tabletop.
rehearsalSchedule.entryCheck: Privacy, IDS/data, and support owners present.

rehearsalSchedule.purpose: Choose provider-assisted sandbox or prepared self-build route.

rehearsalSchedule.session: Issue triage and change request review
rehearsalSchedule.purpose: Route all findings to owners and decide fix, hold, repeat, or stop.
Choose hold, repeat rehearsal, provider route, limited private pilot, no-go, or archive.

ownerSignoffs.cannotApprove: Authority, privacy, IDS/data, support, official-route, or live launch.

ownerSignoffs.decision: Dean advisory findings accepted for triage

ownerSignoffs.evidenceNeeded: Access role map and revoke test.

ownerSignoffs.stopCondition: Fields include ABN, revenue, contact, client, grant, or business-plan data.
Member route or payment route is implied.
Official process is unclear or disagrees.

ownerSignoffs.cannotApprove: Member numbers, education path, payment records.
ownerSignoffs.stopCondition: Official or personal critique fields appear.
Real invite occurs before wording passes.

ownerSignoffs.canApprove: Disable real email invites until consent passes.
ownerSignoffs.stopCondition: Any real email can be sent accidentally.
No-go path cannot be issued safely.

ownerSignoffs.canApprove: Final private decision only when all critical owners pass.

sessionScripts.prompt: State fake/sample-only purpose, no real intake, no official Toastmasters process, and no live Decidim approval.
sessionScripts.stopRule: Any participant expects a real service.

sessionScripts.prompt: Ask each facilitator to confirm all records are fake, minimised, and safe for public demo.
Dean reviews clarity, workflow, build path, and safety boundaries as comments only.
Run fake founder onboarding and minimum business profile.
sessionScripts.expectedEvidence: Completed sample form and issue notes.

sessionScripts.prompt: Run mentor interest, program priority proposal, event poll, and resource suggestion.
Run feedback, support routing, and no-go rehearsal.
Run guest interest, agenda proposal, role sign-up, and welcome sequence.
Run speaking goal, feedback form, reflection, and withdrawal rehearsal.
sessionScripts.stopRule: Personal critique or incident detail appears.

sessionScripts.prompt: Confirm officer election, member record, education, and payment workflows remain outside Decidim.
Assign and revoke a fake role; confirm access is removed.
Run fake data export, backup, restore, deletion, and archive status checks.
Draft public-safe update with no private evidence or approval language.
Route every issue to owner, severity, action, and decision right.
Use scorecard to choose hold, repeat, provider route, limited private pilot, no-go, or archive.

issueTriage.nextAction: Keep official route closed and request boundary note.
Choose provider-assisted route or prepare dependencies.
Disable real outbound email until consent passes.

issueTriage.issue: Public wording could sound like live approval.
Barayamal sample fields need owner review.
Toastmasters feedback path needs support owner.
Dean comments need task routing template.
issueTriage.nextAction: Use issue board and change log.

issueTriage.issue: Backup/export/delete proof needs provider input if provider route chosen.
Public summary needs approval status labels.
Closeout archive owner needs review date.
issueTriage.nextAction: Add review date and retention rule.

issueTriage.issue: Accessibility/mobile QA remains needed for live Decidim build.
Decision meeting cannot occur until scorecard is complete.

changeRequests.change: Add rehearsal control room to public demo.
changeRequests.reason: v4.6 lacked a day-by-day operating surface.
changeRequests.rollback: Remove v4.7 link and keep v4.6.

changeRequests.reason: Decision rights need to be visible.
Blocked items need owner, severity, and route.
Fake accounts need role labels and no-contact rule.
Next steps after rehearsal need a queue.

changeRequests.change: Update nav and Review Pack hub.
changeRequests.reason: Reviewers need to find v4.7 quickly.
changeRequests.acceptance: Control Room appears in hub and nav.

changeRequests.reason: All new docs/data should be browsable.
Upgrade must not imply live approval.
changeRequests.acceptance: Recommended decision says no live launch.

sampleRoster.allowedAction: Submit sample onboarding and program priorities.
sampleRoster.blockedData: Real name, email, phone, ABN, revenue, grant files.

sampleRoster.allowedAction: Vote on sample event poll and resource proposal.
Test minimum profile and mentor interest.
Comment on fake mentor matching interest.
Review sample proposals and export aggregate results.
Submit guest interest and agenda suggestion.
Test role sign-up and speaking goal survey.
Test boundary notice and resource suggestion.
Review sample agenda, roles, and feedback route.
Review field schedule and consent wording.
View scorecard and choose hold/repeat/no-go/archive only.
Run role, email lock, export/delete proof.

acceptanceScorecard.check: No real data in public package.

acceptanceScorecard.target: No ABN, revenue, contact, client, grant, business-plan fields.
Official route stays closed or explicitly scoped.
No real outbound email before consent.
No private evidence or approval claim.
100% issues have owner and next action.
Zero open critical before live intake.
Scorecard, signoffs, issues, and handoffs reviewed.

decisionOptions.whenToUse: Any critical owner gate remains blocked.

decisionOptions.publicLine: A further sample rehearsal is planned.

decisionOptions.whenToUse: Barayamal sample is ready but Toastmasters route remains blocked.
Guest-only boundary is ready but other lanes need hold.

decisionOptions.publicLine: Build path is under private review.

decisionOptions.whenToUse: Every critical authority, privacy, IDS/data, support, official-route, access, rollback, and comms gate passes.
decisionOptions.publicLine: A limited private pilot has been approved.

decisionOptions.whenToUse: Owner declines, critical risk remains, or support/data path is unsuitable.
decisionOptions.publicLine: The project will not proceed at this time.

decisionOptions.whenToUse: Static demo is useful but real pilot is not appropriate now.
decisionOptions.publicLine: The public demo remains as a learning artefact.

priorControlledPilotExecution.recommendedDecision: Proceed with private controlled pilot preparation using fake/sample data only. Keep real participant intake and live Decidim access blocked until every critical release lock, execution gate, support route, access control, acceptance test, rollback path, and public communication passes privately.
